compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: 24VAC terminals (zones 1-6 + common C + master valve M port)
compatible_devices.notes: Controls up to 6 independent 24VAC solenoid irrigation zone valves plus optional master valve. Works with any standard 24VAC solenoid valve. Intended for garden/outdoor sprinkler or drip fertigation systems, NOT grow-room environment control. Can be paired via Tuya local protocol with Smart Life app or Home Assistant custom integration.

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: 24VAC terminals (shared with master valve port M)
compatible_devices.notes: Controller provides 24VAC trigger signal only and does NOT supply main power to the pump. An external pump start relay is mandatory to switch line voltage to the actual pump motor. Connection method identical to master valve wiring.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Rain Bird WR2, Hunter Mini-Clik, Orbit 57069
compatible_devices.notes: Supports 1 rain sensor only. Obey/ignore sensitivity configurable per zone via app. Rain sensor causes controller to skip scheduled watering cycles when rain is detected. Sensor not included.
